title: Substitute Urals with CPC Blend on CDU-2
summary: CDU-2 sulphur at 1.44% is 4pp over the 1.40% limit. Substituting 20 kbpd of Urals with CPC Blend clears the blend violation and lifts GRM by $0.29/bbl on CDU-2.
evidence: T-103 Urals ullage 210 kbbls; T-202 CPC Blend ullage 495 kbbls — substitution feasible.
CPC Blend price differential +$1.40/bbl (as of 14 Apr 06:00 UTC); GRM contribution $9.80/bbl vs Urals $8.95/bbl.
LP target for URALS on CDU-2: 20 kbpd; substitution keeps throughput at planned 65.5 kbpd.
Constraint version BC-2026-04-W2; LP version LP-2026-04-W2.
assumptions: Lead time defaulted to vessel-class typical (Aframax ~20 days, Suezmax ~28 days).
Maintenance calendar stale (last updated 10 Apr) — CDU-1 inspection window 30 Apr–01 May assumed unchanged.
risks: CPC Blend tank T-202 heel depth may require flushing before discharge.
Substitute grade's API (45.3) raises CDU-2 blend API — confirm downstream product slate is on-spec.
nextActions: Validate CPC Blend availability with procurement for the next laycan.
Request LP re-optimization with substituted charge on CDU-2.
Confirm tank nomination: T-202 → CDU-2 feed header.

riskFlags.recommendedAction: Substitute URALS with CPC_BLEND on CDU-2.
